arabic:
وعن عمرو بن العاص رضي الله عنه سمع رسول الله صلى الله عليه وسلم  يقول‏:‏ ‏
"‏إذا حكم الحاكم، فاجتهد، ثم أصاب، فله أجران، وإن حكم واجتهد، فأخطأ، فله أجر‏"‏ ‏(‏‏(‏متفق عليه‏)‏‏)‏‏.‏

english.narrator: 'Amr bin 'Al-'As (May Allah be pleased with him) said:
english.text: I heard the Messenger of Allah (ﷺ) saying, "When a judge utilizes his skill of judgement and comes to a right decision, he will have a double reward, but when he uses his judgement and commits a mistake, he will have a single reward."

chapter.english: The Book of Miscellaneous ahadith of Significant Values
